title: Mo' Bees
description: An addon to Forestry: CE which aims to add more bees and general functionality to the mod.
body:
![In Game Photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46552024f44cc157ef9d545c955c4289ef0d896c.png)

Mo' Bees is an addon for Forestry: Community Edition, inspired by old Forestry addon mods such as Binnies Extra Bees and Magic Bees.

## Notable Features
* Lots of bees. Ore bees, mod compatible ore bees, mob produce bees, magical bees, and more.
* More alveary blocks. Sun Lamp, Mutator, Frame Housing, Rain Shield.
* More frames.

## Credits
noodlepfp for re-imagining the old mods and bringing them to 1.20.1
thedarkcolour for help related to the base mod
The creators of the originals for inspiration and some assets, Binnies team, and MysteriousAges.
